name: Shenzhen Megmeet Electrical Co., LTD
summary: Shenzhen Megmeet Electrical Co., LTD engages in the research and development, production, sales, and services of hardware, software, and system solutions for electrical automation in China. The company offers industrial power supply products, including telecommunication and IT system high-efficiency power supply, medical device power supply, industrial microwave power and control system, electric power supply, and customized industrial power supply; and industrial automation products comprising motor drive, programmable logic controller, and industrial digital smart welding machine. It also provides smart home appliances consisting of display power supply, smart sanitary ware, household microwave power and control system, HVAC and smart cooling controller, and other products; and new energy vehicle products, such as charging station rectifier module, PDU, on-board charger, electric vehicle DC/DC module, motor control unit, and other products. In addition, the company offers newly developed industries products comprising photovoltaic converter, industrial microwave system, smart electric shock controller, electric submersible progressing cavity pumping system, optical fiber flexible bend sensor, and e-cigarette. Its products are used in medical, communications, IT, electricity, transportation, photovoltaic, oil field, police equipment, industrial welding machine, industrial microwave, frequency conversion air conditioning, frequency conversion microwave, laptop display, outdoor color screen, intelligent bathroom, and other industries. The company also operates in approximately 40 countries, including European countries, the United States, India, Brazil, South Korea, Japan, and internationally. Shenzhen Megmeet Electrical Co., LTD was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
